text:
Immunization Services

Immunization Programs
Saskatchewan offers free routine childhood and adult immunizations, and free immunization programs for people at high risk.

When to Get Immunized
Routine vaccines are provided by Public Health and other health-care providers throughout Saskatchewan. 

Immunization Forms and Fact Sheets
Vaccine information sheets are available in English and French.

Immunization Records
Where to access your immunization records.

Immunization Rates in Saskatchewan
Historical information on immunization rates.

Adverse Events Following Immunization
Potential reactions after receiving immunization.

Travel Health Clinic Information
The Saskatchewan Health Authority Travel Health clinics offer individual risk assessment and consultation, counselling and vaccinations to protect your health during trips outside Canada. 

Renseignements en français

National Immunization Awareness Week 
April 21 to 30, 2025

Download NIAW Posters for Clinics
